Package com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration

Class RandomWalkEstimator

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.RandomWalkEstimator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AccelerometerBiasRandomWalkSource, AttitudeUncertaintySource, GyroscopeBiasRandomWalkSource, PositionUncertaintySource, VelocityUncertaintySource
    public class RandomWalkEstimator
extends java.lang.Object
implements AccelerometerBiasRandomWalkSource, GyroscopeBiasRandomWalkSource, AttitudeUncertaintySource, PositionUncertaintySource, VelocityUncertaintySource
    Estimates random walk data by running this estimator while the body of IMU remains static at a given position and orientation when IMU has already been calibrated.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private AccelerationTriad mAccelerationTriad
      Contains acceleration triad to be reused for bias norm estimation.
      private double mAccelerometerBiasPSD
      Accelerometer bias random walk PSD (Power Spectral Density) expressed in (m^2 * s^-5).
      private AngularSpeedTriad mAngularSpeedTriad
      Contains angular speed triad to be reused for bias norm estimation.
      private double mAttitudeVariance
      Attitude variance expressend in squared radians (rad^2).
      private BodyKinematicsBiasEstimator mBiasEstimator
      Estimates bias for fixed body kinematics measurements to determine furhter bias variations while the IMU body remains static.
      private CoordinateTransformation mC
      Coordinate transformation to be reused for estimation of attitude variance.
      private BodyKinematics mFixedKinematics
      Instance containing last fixed body kinematics to be reused.
      private BodyKinematicsFixer mFixer
      Fixes body kinematics measurements using accelerometer + gyroscope calibration data to fix measurements.
      private boolean mFixKinematics
      Indicates whether measured kinematics must be fixed or not.
      private ECEFFrame mFrame
      Contains current frame after one navigation step.
      private double mGyroBiasPSD
      Gyro bias random walk PSD (Power Spectral Density) expressed in (rad^2 * s^-3).
      private com.irurueta.geometry.Quaternion mInvRefQ
      Contains inverse of orientation of reference frame.
      private RandomWalkEstimatorListener mListener
      Listener to handle events raised by this estimator.
      private double mPositionVariance
      Position variance expressed in squared meters (m^2).
      private com.irurueta.geometry.Quaternion mQ
      Contains current frame orientation.
      private ECEFFrame mReferenceFrame
      Contains frame provided initially for bias estimation.
      private com.irurueta.geometry.Quaternion mRefQ
      Contains orientation of reference frame.
      private boolean mRunning
      Indicates whether this estimator is running or not.
      private double mVelocityVariance
      Velocity variance expressed in (m^2/s^2).

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addBodyKinematics​(BodyKinematics kinematics)
      Adds a sample of measured body kinematics (accelerometer + gyroscope readings) obtained from an IMU, fixes their values and uses fixed values to estimate any additional existing bias or position and velocity variation while the IMU body remains static.

      Sets acceleration z scaling factor.

      Sets angular speed bias values expressed in radians per second (rad/s).

      void setTimeInterval​(double timeInterval)
      Sets time interval between body kinematics (IMU acceleration + gyroscope) samples expressed in seconds (s).
      void setTimeInterval​(com.irurueta.units.Time timeInterval)
      Sets time interval between body kinematics (IMU acceleration + gyroscope) samples.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • mListener

        private RandomWalkEstimatorListener mListener
        Listener to handle events raised by this estimator.

      • mFixer

        private final BodyKinematicsFixer mFixer
        Fixes body kinematics measurements using accelerometer + gyroscope calibration data to fix measurements.

      • mBiasEstimator

        private final BodyKinematicsBiasEstimator mBiasEstimator
        Estimates bias for fixed body kinematics measurements to determine furhter bias variations while the IMU body remains static.

      • mFixedKinematics

        private final BodyKinematics mFixedKinematics
        Instance containing last fixed body kinematics to be reused.

      • mFixKinematics

        private boolean mFixKinematics
        Indicates whether measured kinematics must be fixed or not. When enabled, provided calibration data is used, otherwise it is ignored. By default this is enabled.

      • mRunning

        private boolean mRunning
        Indicates whether this estimator is running or not.

      • mAccelerometerBiasPSD

        private double mAccelerometerBiasPSD
        Accelerometer bias random walk PSD (Power Spectral Density) expressed in (m^2 * s^-5).

      • mGyroBiasPSD

        private double mGyroBiasPSD
        Gyro bias random walk PSD (Power Spectral Density) expressed in (rad^2 * s^-3).

      • mPositionVariance

        private double mPositionVariance
        Position variance expressed in squared meters (m^2).

      • mVelocityVariance

        private double mVelocityVariance
        Velocity variance expressed in (m^2/s^2).

      • mAttitudeVariance

        private double mAttitudeVariance
        Attitude variance expressend in squared radians (rad^2).

      • mC

        private final CoordinateTransformation mC
        Coordinate transformation to be reused for estimation of attitude variance. This is reused for efficiency.

      • mRefQ

        private final com.irurueta.geometry.Quaternion mRefQ
        Contains orientation of reference frame. This is reused for efficiency.

      • mInvRefQ

        private final com.irurueta.geometry.Quaternion mInvRefQ
        Contains inverse of orientation of reference frame. This is reused for efficiency.

      • mQ

        private final com.irurueta.geometry.Quaternion mQ
        Contains current frame orientation. This is reused for efficiency.

      • mReferenceFrame

        private final ECEFFrame mReferenceFrame
        Contains frame provided initially for bias estimation. This is reused for efficiency.

      • mFrame

        private final ECEFFrame mFrame
        Contains current frame after one navigation step. This is reused for efficiency.

      • mAccelerationTriad

        private final AccelerationTriad mAccelerationTriad
        Contains acceleration triad to be reused for bias norm estimation. This is reused for efficiency.

      • mAngularSpeedTriad

        private final AngularSpeedTriad mAngularSpeedTriad
        Contains angular speed triad to be reused for bias norm estimation. This is reused for efficiency.

    • Constructor Detail

      • RandomWalkEstimator

        public RandomWalkEstimator()
        Constructor.

      • RandomWalkEstimator

        public RandomWalkEstimator​(RandomWalkEstimatorListener listener)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        listener - listener to handle events.

      • RandomWalkEstimator

        public RandomWalkEstimator​(AccelerationTriad ba,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ma,
                           AngularSpeedTriad bg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mg)
                    throws com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        ba - acceleration bias to be set.
        ma - acceleration cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        bg - angular speed bias to be set.
        mg - angular speed cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        Throws:
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided cross coupling matrices cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrices are not 3x3.

      • RandomWalkEstimator

                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ma,
                           AngularSpeedTriad bg,

        ma - acceleration cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        bg - angular speed bias to be set.
        mg - angular speed cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        listener - listener to handle events.
        Throws:
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided cross coupling matrices cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrices are not 3x3.

        public RandomWalkEstimator​(com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ba,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ma,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix bg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mg)
                    throws com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        ba - acceleration bias to be set expressed in meters per squared second (m/s`2). Must be 3x1.
        ma - acceleration cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        bg - angular speed bias to be set expressed in radians per second (rad/s). Must be 3x1.
        mg - angular speed cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        Throws:
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided cross coupling matrices cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrices do not have proper size.

        public RandomWalkEstimator​(NEDPosition nedPosition,
                           CoordinateTransformation nedC,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ba,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ma,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix bg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix gg,
                           RandomWalkEstimatorListener listener)
                    throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        nedPosition - position expressed on NED coordinates.
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        ba - acceleration bias to be set expressed in meters per squared second (m/s`2). Must be 3x1.
        ma - acceleration cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        bg - angular speed bias to be set expressed in radians per second (rad/s). Must be 3x1.
        mg - angular speed cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        gg - angular speed g-dependent cross biases matrix. Must be 3x3.
        listener - listener to handle events.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided cross coupling matrices cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrices are not 3x3.

      • RandomWalkEstimator

        public RandomWalkEstimator​(ECEFPosition ecefPosition,
                           CoordinateTransformation nedC)
                    throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        ecefPosition - position expressed on ECEF coordinates.
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.

        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        ba - acceleration bias to be set.
        ma - acceleration cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        bg - angular speed bias to be set.
        mg - angular speed cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        timeInterval - time interval between body kinematics samples expressed in seconds (s).
        listener - listener to handle events.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided cross coupling matrices cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrices are not 3x3.

      • RandomWalkEstimator

        public RandomWalkEstimator​(ECEFPosition ecefPosition,
                           CoordinateTransformation nedC,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ba,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ma,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix bg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix gg,
                           double timeInterval)
                    throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        ecefPosition - position expressed on ECEF coordinates.
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        ba - acceleration bias to be set.
        ma - acceleration cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        bg - angular speed bias to be set.
        mg - angular speed cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        gg - angular speed g-dependent cross biases matrix. Must be 3x3.
        timeInterval - time interval between body kinematics samples expressed in seconds (s).
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided cross coupling matrices cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrices are not 3x3.

      • RandomWalkEstimator

        public RandomWalkEstimator​(ECEFPosition ecefPosition,
                           CoordinateTransformation nedC,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ba,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix ma,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix bg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mg,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix gg,
                           double timeInterval,
                           RandomWalkEstimatorListener listener)
                    throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                           com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        ecefPosition - position expressed on ECEF coordinates.
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        ba - acceleration bias to be set.
        ma - acceleration cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        bg - angular speed bias to be set.
        mg - angular speed cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        gg - angular speed g-dependent cross biases matrix. Must be 3x3.
        timeInterval - time interval between body kinematics samples expressed in seconds (s).
        listener - listener to handle events.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided cross coupling matrices cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrices are not 3x3.

        biasZ - z-coordinate of bias.
        Throws:
        LockedException - if estimator is running.

      • getAngularSpeedCrossCouplingErrors

        public com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix getAngularSpeedCrossCouplingErrors()
        Gets angular speed cross coupling errors matrix.
        Returns:
        cross coupling errors matrix.

      • getAngularSpeedCrossCouplingErrors

        public void getAngularSpeedCrossCouplingErrors​(com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix result)
        Gets angular speed cross coupling errors matrix.
        Parameters:
        result - instance where result will be stored.

      • setAngularSpeedCrossCouplingErrors

        public void setAngularSpeedCrossCouplingErrors​(com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix crossCouplingErrors)
                                        throws com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException,
                                               LockedException
        Sets angular speed cross coupling errors matrix.
        Parameters:
        crossCouplingErrors - cross coupling errors matrix. Must be 3x3.
        Throws:
        com.irurueta.algebra.AlgebraException - if provided matrix cannot be inverted.
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided matrix is not 3x3.
        LockedException - if estimator is running.

      • getEcefFrame

        public ECEFFrame getEcefFrame()
        Gets ECEF frame containing current body position and orientation expressed in ECEF coordinates. Frame also contains body velocity, but it is always assumed to be zero during calibration.
        Returns:
        ECEF frame containing current body position and orientation resolved around ECEF axes.

      • getEcefFrame

        public void getEcefFrame​(ECEFFrame result)
        Gets ECEF frame containing current body position and orientation expressed in ECEF coordinates. Frame also contains body velocity, but it is always assumed to be zero during calibration.
        Parameters:
        result - instance where ECEF frame containing current body position and orientation resolved around ECEF axes will be stored.

      • getEcefC

        public CoordinateTransformation getEcefC()
        Gets current body orientation as a transformation from body to ECEF coordinates. Notice that returned orientation refers to ECEF Earth axes, which means that orientation is not relative to the ground or horizon at current body position. Typically it is more convenient to use getNedC() to obtain orientation relative to the ground or horizon at current body position. For instance, on Android devices a NED orientation with Euler angles (roll = 0, pitch = 0, yaw = 0) means that the device is laying flat on a horizontal surface with the screen facing down towards the ground.
        Returns:
        current body orientation resolved on ECEF axes.

      • getEcefC

        public void getEcefC​(CoordinateTransformation result)
        Gets current body orientation as a transformation from body to ECEF coordinates. Notice that returned orientation refers to ECEF Earth axes, which means that orientation is not relative to the ground or horizon at current body position. Typically it is more convenient to use getNedC() to obtain orientation relative to the ground or horizon at current body position. For instance, on Android devices a NED orientation with Euler angles (roll = 0, pitch = 0, yaw = 0) means that the device is laying flat on a horizontal surface with the screen facing down towards the ground.
        Parameters:
        result - instance where current body orientation resolved on ECEF axes will be stored.

      • setEcefC

        public void setEcefC​(CoordinateTransformation ecefC)
              throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                     LockedException
        Sets current body orientation as a transformation from body to ECEF coordinates. Notice that ECEF orientation refers to ECEF Earth axes, which means that orientation is not relative to the ground or horizont at current body position. Typically it is more convenient to use setNedC(CoordinateTransformation) to specify orientation relative to the ground or horizon at current body position. For instance, on Android devices a NED orientation with Euler angles (roll = 0, pitch = 0, yaw = 0) means that the device is laying flat on a horizontal surface with the screen facing down towards the ground.
        Parameters:
        ecefC - body orientation resolved on ECEF axes to be set.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to ECEF coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.

      • getNedC

        public CoordinateTransformation getNedC()
        Gets current body orientation as a transformation from body to NED coordinates. Notice that returned orientation refers to current local position. This means that two equal NED orientations will transform into different ECEF orientations if the body is located at different positions. As a reference, on Android devices a NED orientation with Euler angles (roll = 0, pitch = 0, yaw = 0) means that the device is laying flat on a horizontal surface with the screen facing down towards the ground.
        Returns:
        current body orientation resolved on NED axes.

      • getNedC

        public void getNedC​(CoordinateTransformation result)
        Gets current body orientation as a transformation from body to NED coordinates. Notice that returned orientation refers to current local position. This means that two equal NED orientations will transform into different ECEF orientations if the body is located at different positions. As a reference, on Android devices a NED orientation with Euler angles (roll = 0, pitch = 0, yaw = 0) means that the device is laying flat on a horizontal surface with the screen facing down towards the ground.
        Parameters:
        result - instance where current body orientation resolved on NED axes will be stored.

      • setNedC

        public void setNedC​(CoordinateTransformation nedC)
             throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                    LockedException
        Sets current body orientation as a transformation from body to NED coordinates. Notice that provided orientation refers to current local position. This means that two equal NED orientations will transform into different ECEF orientations if the body is located at different positions. As a reference, on Android devices a NED orientation with Euler angles (roll = 0, pitch = 0, yaw = 0) means that the device is laying flat on a horizontal surface with the screen facing down towards the ground.
        Parameters:
        nedC - orientation resolved on NED axes to be set.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.

      • setNedPositionAndNedOrientation

        public void setNedPositionAndNedOrientation​(NEDPosition nedPosition,
                                            CoordinateTransformation nedC)
                                     throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                            LockedException
        Sets position and orientation both expressed on NED coordinates.
        Parameters:
        nedPosition - position expressed on NED coordinates.
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setNedPosition(NEDPosition), setNedC(CoordinateTransformation)

                                             double longitude,

                                             CoordinateTransformation ecefC)
                                      throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                             LockedException
        Sets position expressed on NED coordinates and orientation respect to ECEF axes.
        Parameters:
        latitude - latitude expressed in radians (rad).
        longitude - longitude expressed in radians (rad).
        height - height expressed in meters (m).
        ecefC - body to ECEF coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to ECEF coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setNedPosition(double, double, double), setEcefC(CoordinateTransformation)

      • setNedPositionAndEcefOrientation

        public void setNedPositionAndEcefOrientation​(com.irurueta.units.Angle latitude,
                                             com.irurueta.units.Angle longitude,
                                             double height,
                                             CoordinateTransformation ecefC)
                                      throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                             LockedException
        Sets position expressed on NED coordinates and orientation respect to ECEF axes.
        Parameters:
        latitude - latitude.
        longitude - longitude.
        height - height expressed in meters (m).
        ecefC - body to ECEF coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to ECEF coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setNedPosition(Angle, Angle, double), setEcefC(CoordinateTransformation)

      • setNedPositionAndEcefOrientation

        public void setNedPositionAndEcefOrientation​(com.irurueta.units.Angle latitude,
                                             com.irurueta.units.Angle longitude,
                                             com.irurueta.units.Distance height,
                                             CoordinateTransformation ecefC)
                                      throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                             LockedException
        Sets position expressed on NED coordinates and orientation respect to ECEF axes.
        Parameters:
        latitude - latitude.
        longitude - longitude.
        height - height.
        ecefC - body to ECEF coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to ECEF coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setNedPosition(Angle, Angle, Distance), setEcefC(CoordinateTransformation)

      • setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation

        public void setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation​(ECEFPosition ecefPosition,
                                             CoordinateTransformation nedC)
                                      throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                             LockedException
        Sets position expressed on ECEF coordinates and orientation respect to NED axes. In order to preserve provided orientation, first position is set and then orientation is applied.
        Parameters:
        ecefPosition - position expressed on ECEF coordinates.
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setEcefPosition(ECEFPosition), setNedC(CoordinateTransformation)

      • setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation

        public void setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation​(double x,
                                             double y,
                                             double z,
                                             CoordinateTransformation nedC)
                                      throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                             LockedException
        Sets position expressed on ECEF coordinates and orientation respect to NED axes. In order to preserve provided orientation, first position is set and then orientation is applied.
        Parameters:
        x - x coordinate of ECEF position expressed in meters (m).
        y - y coordinate of ECEF position expressed in meters (m).
        z - z coordinate of ECEF position expressed in meters (m).
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setEcefPosition(double, double, double), setNedC(CoordinateTransformation)

      • setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation

        public void setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation​(com.irurueta.units.Distance x,
                                             com.irurueta.units.Distance y,
                                             com.irurueta.units.Distance z,
                                             CoordinateTransformation nedC)
                                      throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                             LockedException
        Sets position expressed on ECEF coordinates and orientation respect to NED axes. In order to preserve provided orientation, first position is set and then orientation is applied.
        Parameters:
        x - x coordinate of ECEF position.
        y - y coordinate of ECEF position.
        z - z coordinate of ECEF position.
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setEcefPosition(Distance, Distance, Distance), setNedC(CoordinateTransformation)

      • setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation

        public void setEcefPositionAndNedOrientation​(com.irurueta.geometry.Point3D position,
                                             CoordinateTransformation nedC)
                                      throws InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException,
                                             LockedException
        Sets position expressed on ECEF coordinates and orientation respect to NED axes. In order to preserve provided orientation, first position is set and then orientation is applied.
        Parameters:
        position - position resolved around ECEF axes and expressed in meters (m).
        nedC - body to NED coordinate transformation indicating body orientation.
        Throws:
        InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException - if provided coordinate transformation is not from body to NED coordinates.
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        See Also:
        setEcefPosition(Point3D), setNedC(CoordinateTransformation)

      • getNumberOfProcessedSamples

        public int getNumberOfProcessedSamples()
        Gets number of samples that have been processed so far.
        Returns:
        number of samples that have been processed so far.

      • isFixKinematicsEnabled

        public boolean isFixKinematicsEnabled()
        Indicates whether measured kinematics must be fixed or not. When enabled, provided calibration data is used, otherwise it is ignored. By default this is enabled.
        Returns:
        indicates whether measured kinematics must be fixed or not.

      • setFixKinematicsEnabled

        public void setFixKinematicsEnabled​(boolean fixKinematics)
                             throws LockedException
        Specifies whether measured kinematics must be fixed or not. When enabled, provided calibration data is used, otherwise it is ignored.
        Parameters:
        fixKinematics - true if measured kinematics must be fixed or not.
        Throws:
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.

      • isRunning

        public boolean isRunning()
        Indicates whether this estimator is running or not.
        Returns:
        true if estimator is running, false otherwise.

      • addBodyKinematics

        public void addBodyKinematics​(BodyKinematics kinematics)
                       throws LockedException,
                              RandomWalkEstimationException
        Adds a sample of measured body kinematics (accelerometer + gyroscope readings) obtained from an IMU, fixes their values and uses fixed values to estimate any additional existing bias or position and velocity variation while the IMU body remains static.
        Parameters:
        kinematics - measured body kinematics.
        Throws:
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.
        RandomWalkEstimationException - if estimation fails for some reason.

      • reset

        public boolean reset()
              throws LockedException
        Resets current estimator.
        Returns:
        true if estimator was successfully reset, false if no reset was needed.
        Throws:
        LockedException - if estimator is currently running.

      • getAccelerometerBiasPSD

        public double getAccelerometerBiasPSD()
        Gets estimated accelerometer bias random walk PSD (Power Spectral Density) expressed in (m^2 * s^-5). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig.
        Specified by:
        getAccelerometerBiasPSD in interface AccelerometerBiasRandomWalkSource
        Returns:
        accelerometer bias random walk PSD.

      • getGyroBiasPSD

        public double getGyroBiasPSD()
        Gets estimated gyro bias random walk PSD (Power Spectral Density) expressed in (rad^2 * s^-3). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig.
        Specified by:
        getGyroBiasPSD in interface GyroscopeBiasRandomWalkSource
        Returns:
        gyroscope gias random walk PSD.

      • getPositionVariance

        public double getPositionVariance()
        Gets estimated position variance expressed in squared meters (m^2). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Returns:
        position variance.

      • getVelocityVariance

        public double getVelocityVariance()
        Gets estimated velocity variance expressed in (m^2/s^2). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Returns:
        velocity variance.

      • getAttitudeVariance

        public double getAttitudeVariance()
        Gets estimated attitude variance expressed in squared radians (rad^2). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Returns:
        attitude variance.

      • getPositionStandardDeviation

        public double getPositionStandardDeviation()
        Gets standard deviation of position noise expressed in meters (m). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Specified by:
        getPositionStandardDeviation in interface PositionUncertaintySource
        Returns:
        standard deviation of position noise.

      • getPositionStandardDeviationAsDistance

        public com.irurueta.units.Distance getPositionStandardDeviationAsDistance()
        Gets standard deviation of position noise. This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Returns:
        standard deviation of position noise.

      • getPositionStandardDeviationAsDistance

        public void getPositionStandardDeviationAsDistance​(com.irurueta.units.Distance result)
        Gets standard deviation of position noise. This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Parameters:
        result - instance where result will be stored.

      • getVelocityStandardDeviation

        public double getVelocityStandardDeviation()
        Gets standard deviation of velocity noise expressed in meters per second (m/s). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Specified by:
        getVelocityStandardDeviation in interface VelocityUncertaintySource
        Returns:
        standard deviation of velocity noise.

        Gets standard deviation of velocity noise. This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Returns:
        standard deviation of velocity noise.

      • getVelocityStandardDeviationAsSpeed

        public void getVelocityStandardDeviationAsSpeed​(com.irurueta.units.Speed result)
        Gets standard deviation of velocity noise. This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanConfig and INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Parameters:
        result - instance where result will be stored.

      • getAttitudeStandardDeviation

        public double getAttitudeStandardDeviation()
        Gets standard deviation of attitude noise expressed in radians (rad). This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Specified by:
        getAttitudeStandardDeviation in interface AttitudeUncertaintySource
        Returns:
        standard deviation of attitude noise.

        Gets standard deviation of attitude noise. This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Returns:
        standard deviation of attitude noise.

      • getAttitudeStandardDeviationAsAngle

        public void getAttitudeStandardDeviationAsAngle​(com.irurueta.units.Angle result)
        Gets standard deviation of attitude noise. This can be used by INSLooselyCoupledKalmanInitializerConfig.
        Parameters:
        result - instance where result will be stored.

      • getFixedKinematics

        public BodyKinematics getFixedKinematics()
        Gets last added kinematics after being fixed using provided calibration data. If kinematics fix is disabled, this will be equal to the last provided measured kinematics.
        Returns:
        last fixed body kinematics.

      • getFixedKinematics

        public void getFixedKinematics​(BodyKinematics result)
        Gets last added kinematics after being fixed using provided calibration data. If kinematics fix is disabled, this will be equal to the last provided measured kinematics.
        Parameters:
        result - last fixed body kinematics.
